title: World Baseball Classic preview: Power Rankings, most likely MVPs and how far each team could go
content: Can anyone challenge Team USA? Which stars will shine brightest? Here's everything you need for the 2026 WBC.

title: Sources: Celtics' Tatum expected to return Fri.
content: Celtics superstar Jayson Tatum is expected to make his 2025-26 NBA season debut against the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night at TD Garden, sources told ESPN.

title: Bills trading for Bears WR Moore, sources say
content: The Bears have agreed to a trade to send wide receiver DJ Moore to the Bills, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Sources: Saints sack king Jordan to be free agent
content: Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan will become a free agent when the new league begins next week, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Blues' Parayko nixes trade to Sabres, source says
content: Blues defenseman Colton Parayko has invoked his no-movement clause to prevent a trade to the Sabres, according to multiple reports.

title: UFC champ Aspinall, boxing's Hearn join forces
content: UFC heavyweight champion Tom Aspinall has signed a "commercial and advisory" deal with Eddie Hearn's newly established Matchroom Talent Agency.

title: Texans reach deal to re-sign veteran OT Brown
content: Offensive tackle Trent Brown and the Texans reached agreement Thursday on a one-year extension worth up to $7 million, agent Drew Rosenhaus told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Leafs trade Roy to Avs for 1st-, 5th-round picks
content: The Maple Leafs traded center Nicolas Roy to the Avalanche for a conditional first-round draft choice in 2027 and a conditional fifth-round pick in 2026.

title: Sold-out PWHL game at MSG to set U.S. record
content: The PWHL game on April 4 between the New York Sirens and the Seattle Torrent has sold out Madison Square Garden, with a crowd expected to set a U.S. attendance record for a professional women's hockey game.

title: ⚾ MLB Rank: Ranking baseball's top 100 players
content: From star sluggers like Ohtani and Judge to top pitchers like Skubal, we rank -- and make predictions for -- the best players in baseball right now.

title: School of scandal: Coach allegedly moonlighted as a pimp
content: Multiple dismissals have occurred at Cal State Bakersfield as an investigation probes who knew what and when.

title: How Jayson Tatum's improbable return could change the NBA title race
content: Here's the latest on Tatum's return to Boston after a devastating Achilles injury -- and how it could shift the NBA's balance of power with just weeks to go in the season.

title: NBA All-Contract Team: Brunson, Avdija, Johnson lead 15-player roster
content: Could a roster built with only the best contracts in the league -- no max or rookie deals allowed -- reach the playoffs?

title: Why is Kyler Murray's free agency a little different? Let's answer nine big NFL offseason questions
content: Where will Kyler Murray land? Could offensive linemen get paid big money? Who is the best edge-rushing option? And what will happen with A.J. Brown?

title: DJ Moore to Bills: Bears to eye Linderbaum? Impact on Allen, draft
content: Will trading Moore's contract enable Chicago to bolster its offensive line? That's one of eight questions we answer.

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State, Miami create separation with key wins
content: The Buckeyes and Canes solidified their standings on the right side of the respective Big Ten and ACC bubbles.

title: Men's Power Rankings: What's at stake in every power conference
content: Can Florida rise to a 1-seed? Will UConn or St. John's win the Big East? What's on the line for our final top 25.

title: Nine big questions for the nine top freshmen in the 2026 NBA draft
content: What key questions remain for Boozer, Peterson and seven other top freshmen in the 2026 NBA draft class?

title: Women's Bracketology: Bubble bursts for Bulldogs, Cardinal and Aggies
content: Losses Wednesday in their Champ Week openers dashed NCAA tournament hopes for three teams on the bubble.

title: Wyshynski's NHL trade tier rankings: Which big names could bring a Stanley Cup?
content: The playoff races have restarted, with many teams seeking to bolster their rosters for a deep run this spring.

title: Why the Chiefs traded Trent McDuffie, and what's next
content: The last time the Chiefs traded away a player of McDuffie's caliber, they went to three straight Super Bowls.

title: 'Nobody sleeps for like a month': How WNBA GMs will squeeze in drafts, free agency once CBA in place
content: As CBA negotiations linger, the time to conduct drafts and free agency gets shorter. We asked WNBA GMs how they're preparing.

title: USMNT Big Board: Who should make Pochettino's USMNT roster for March camp?
content: It's the month of the final matches for the USMNT before its pre-World Cup camp. Who is looking good, and who is on the outside looking in for Mauricio Pochettino's squad?

title: Process over perfection: How UConn prepared to chase its third title in four years
content: The pressure of expectation derailed the Huskies' bid for a three-peat. Perspective has them back in contention.

title: The best teams in Europe: Can anybody touch Barcelona, Bayern?
content: As the calendar turns into March, we've seen more than enough in 2026 so far to rank the hottest, most in-form European clubs. Where does your team rank?

title: How a 21-year-old prodigy and a 38-year-old veteran ended up with the same fight
content: UFC 326 features a fight between Raul Rosas Jr. and Rob Font in an ultimate battle of youth vs. experience.

title: How Stewart and the Mist overcame Plum's 40 points to win the Unrivaled title
content: Despite 40 points from Kelsey Plum, Breanna Stewart led the Mist past the Phantom for the 2026 Unrivaled title.

title: 'I think she's coming back': Djokovic buzzes about Serena Williams' possible return
content: Novak Djokovic said he thought Wimbledon would be a great potential site for Serena Williams to officially make her return.

title: Inside a surprise dance performance from UCLA women's basketball stars
content: Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez and Charlisse Leger-Walker high kicked their way onto the UCLA dance team.

title: The craziest F1 start ever? Why Australian Grand Prix might see chaos from the start
content: Grand prix starts have always held the potential for chaos, but this year there's almost guaranteed drama when the lights go out in Australia on Sunday. ESPN explains why.

title: Emma Hayes' vision for 2027 World Cup is becoming clear
content: After so much experimentation, how the USWNT will look under Emma Hayes at the 2027 Women's World Cup is becoming evident.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Wrexham want Robertson if Premier League dream succeeds
content: Liverpool left back Andy Robertson is on the agenda of Wrexham if they seal a place in the Premier League. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 33 players who jump out for 2026, from Vladdy to Arraez
content: Tristan H.Cockcroft highlights the players -- and stats -- that have grabbed his attention heading into the fantasy baseball season.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 499 runs and 34 sixes later, India beat England to enter T20 World Cup final
content: Sanju Samson's blistering 89 powered India to a massive total before the bowlers held their nerve in a six-hitting thriller at the Wankhede. England threatened through Jacob Bethell's century, but Jasprit Bumrah and Hardik Pandya's exceptional bowling sealed a dramatic seven-run win as India set up a T20 World Cup 2026 final clash with New Zealand.

title: 'We didn’t ask for ceasefire': Iran rejects US claim, says Tehran ‘ready for US ground invasion'
content: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi declared readiness for a potential US ground invasion, asserting confidence in confronting American forces and dismissing any ceasefire requests. He blamed US or Israeli forces for a deadly school strike, stating negotiations have collapsed due to recent military actions, and warned of no winners in the escalating regional conflict.

title: Efforts on to evacuated Kashmiri students from Iran, says Farooq and Omar Abdullah
content: Jammu and Kashmir authorities are coordinating with the Centre to bring back students, primarily medical students, stranded in Iran. Officials are facilitating peaceful expressions of condolences while urging against exploiting the situation. Internet services have been restricted in Kashmir ahead of planned protests. Efforts are underway to evacuate students to safer locations within Iran before flying them home.

title: Ending Ukraine war in everyone's interest, UNSC seat for India crucial: Finland prez
content: India and Finland emphasized that ending the Russia-Ukraine war is crucial for global stability and called for UN reform. Both nations agreed to support a just peace in Ukraine through diplomacy. A new Migration and Mobility Agreement was signed, fostering cooperation in technology, defense, and critical minerals, strengthening bilateral ties and global supply chains.

title: Senior Pentagon official breaks silence on Anthropic-department of war dispute
content: A Pentagon official revealed alarming AI contract restrictions that could halt military operations.  These limitations, found in contracts with Anthropic, prevented planning for potential combat scenarios.  The dispute escalated when an AI executive questioned its use in a high-profile mission, leading to Anthropic being deemed a security risk and banned from government work, while OpenAI secured a new deal.

title: Trump says he must be involved in selecting next leader for Iran
content: President Trump declared he will personally select Iran's next leader, deeming Ali Khamenei's son, Mojtaba, "unacceptable." Trump stated he must be involved in the appointment, comparing it to Venezuela, to ensure a leader who brings peace, not war. This comes amid a US military campaign targeting Iran's capabilities, not regime change.

title: Mark Zuckerberg is done with Meta's highest-paid employee, this reorganisation proves
content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has quietly dismantled Alexandr Wang's power nine months after the $14 billion hire. The 28-year-old data labeling entrepreneur now oversees AI models being built on infrastructure he doesn't control. A new applied AI engineering organization under Andrew Bosworth routes talent and data pipelines around Wang entirely. Researchers report to other executives. Wang keeps his title but loses every lever that matters—a calculated pivot that suggests Zuckerberg's bet has already failed.

title: Iran crisis: Rahul questions PM Modi's 'silence' on warship sinking in 'our backyard'
content: Congress leaders Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi's silence on the "conflict" and the sinking of an Iranian warship. They accused the government of "surrendering strategic sovereignty" and "undoing" India's foreign policy, particularly concerning oil imports and the safety of Indian citizens in the Gulf region.

title: Jammu & Kashmir cricket association scam: Farooq Abdullah gets relief from ED
content: A Srinagar court has rejected the Enforcement Directorate's bid to add charges against Dr. Farooq Abdullah and others in the JKCA scam. While the ED cannot join the existing CBI case, the court found prima facie evidence of criminal conspiracy and breach of trust.

title: Google founder Sergey Brin reportedly linked to Billionaire Bunker
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is reportedly linked to a $51 million waterfront mansion purchase in Miami's exclusive Allison Island. While his name isn't on the deed, transaction documents point to his involvement. This move places him alongside other tech titans like Larry Page and Mark Zuckerberg, who have also invested heavily in Miami's luxury real estate market, driving up prices.

title: US asked Ukraine for help against Iranian drones in Middle East, says Zelenskyy
content: Ukraine has agreed to share its expertise and interceptor drone technology to help the US counter Iranian attacks in the Middle East. President Zelenskyy emphasized that this assistance will only be provided if it doesn't compromise Ukraine's own defense and strengthens diplomatic ties. He also suggested a potential drone-for-missile swap with Gulf allies.

title: $20K drones vs $4m US missiles: How Iran is managing to hit targets across Middle East
content: A new conflict between the US and Iran is unfolding. Iran is deploying inexpensive drones, forcing the US and its allies to use costly interceptor missiles. This creates a significant economic imbalance. The war is becoming a battle of endurance, testing which side can sustain its weapon supplies longer.

title: 'This should go to him': Samson credits this India player for T20 WC win
content: India defeated England by seven runs in a high-scoring T20 World Cup semi-final at Wankhede to reach the final against New Zealand. Sanju Samson’s 89 helped India post 253/7, while Jacob Bethell scored 105 in England’s chase of 246/7. Samson praised Jasprit Bumrah’s death bowling, saying, “All credit goes to Jasprit Bumrah… I think this should go to him, actually.”

title: Connor McDavid sends clear message as Edmonton Oilers face trade deadline
content: Connor McDavid quickly endorsed the Oilers’ trade for Connor Murphy, stressing the need to add talent without subtracting key pieces. With Edmonton firmly in a win now phase and draft picks holding less value, the move reflects urgency around the Stanley Cup chase. Chicago gains a future asset, while the Oilers strengthen their blue line for an immediate playoff push.

title: Jerry Jones’ Dallas Cowboys linked to $106M Las Vegas Raiders DE trade
content: Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones is reportedly targeting Las Vegas Raiders defensive end Maxx Crosby in a blockbuster trade. Analysts suggest the Cowboys are best positioned to acquire Crosby. The edge rusher is seeking a Super Bowl contender. And Jones is hungry for a Lombardi Trophy after a drought of 30 years. This potential move aligns with the Cowboys owner’s history of aggressive trades like Micah Parsons, Herschel Walker, and George Pickens.

title: New York Yankees linked to $330M Philadelphia Phillies star to pair with Aaron Judge
content: The New York Yankees are reportedly exploring a trade for Bryce Harper from the Philadelphia Phillies during the 2026 preseason. Such a move would pair Harper with Aaron Judge, significantly boosting the Yankees' offensive power. This potential deal could see the Yankees send outfield depth and prospects to Philadelphia, while the Phillies would gain financial flexibility and farm system depth.

title: US-Israel vs Iran: Conflict turns regional war on Day 6 - what has happened so far
content: An intense and well-planned US-Israel operation targeting Iran on February 28 has plunged the Middle East into chaos. In response, Iran launched missile strikes on Tel Aviv and US military outposts, heightening the crisis. This conflict has severely disrupted global energy markets, with Iran initiating a blockade of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: Why the US–Israel vs Iran conflict brings India's PRAHAAR into sharper focus
content: While the Iran vs Israel-US confrontation continues to be viewed largely through the lens of conventional military escalation, it has also revealed the quieter but equally consequential dimension of modern conflict like intelligence penetration and institutional vulnerability.​​ ​For India, this lesson sits at the heart of PRAHAAR - the country's first counter-terror doctrine.

title: UAE property boom faces first major test after Iran strikes shake investor confidence
content: Iranian missile strikes have disrupted the UAE's property boom, shaking investor confidence and casting uncertainty over a market heavily reliant on foreign capital.  The geopolitical tensions emerged as warnings of property sector overheating were already surfacing, impacting developer stock prices and bond markets.

title: Afghanistan, Iraq, Iran and beyond: Tracking US strikes across the world since 2001
content: Since 9/11, the US has engaged in extensive military actions across at least 10 countries, including full-scale wars and drone campaigns. These interventions, part of the "war on terror," have resulted in nearly a million deaths and trillions of dollars spent, reshaping American foreign policy for over two decades.

title: Draymond Green reacts to Blackpink K-Pop song mentioning his name
content: Golden State Warriors star Draymond Green expressed excitement after being name-dropped by the popular Korean girl group Blackpink. It was in their new song "Me and My." Green, a four-time NBA champion, views the K-Pop mention as a significant validation of his global influence and popularity. He plans to listen to the song with his daughters, who are fans of K-Pop.

title: Beyond oil: How US-Iran war may hit India's economy; sector-wise impact explained
content: Beyond oil, it’s important to note that West Asia plays an important role in supplying India with essential commodities. In 2025, India’s imports from the region of approximately $98.7 billion included critical resources such as energy, fertilisers and industrial inputs.

title: Sushasan, switches and survival: End of an era in Bihar as Nitish moves on
content: Bihar's longest-serving Chief Minister, Nitish Kumar, has filed his nomination for the Rajya Sabha, marking a significant political shift. After over two decades in power, Kumar's move, announced via social media, has surprised many within his party and political circles, signaling the end of an era in state politics.

title: India condoles Khamenei's death; EAM Jaishankar speaks to Iran's FM
content: India has formally expressed condolences for the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, with the Foreign Secretary visiting the Iranian Embassy. Amidst escalating regional tensions, Prime Minister Modi has engaged in extensive diplomatic outreach, speaking with leaders of several Gulf nations and Israel. These discussions focused on regional security and the welfare of the large Indian diaspora.

title: B'luru traffic tangle: Police plan right-side driving at key junctions to ease gridlock
content: Bengaluru police are piloting a shift to right-side driving on congested roads near junctions to ease traffic. This American-style system, already successful near Garuda Mall, aims to allow vehicles exiting the city to move more freely, reducing bottlenecks during peak hours.

title: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan joins Abhishek Bachchan at Arjun Tendulkar’s wedding
content: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan made a rare public appearance at a wedding, captivating onlookers with her elegant Manish Malhotra anarkali. Accompanied by Abhishek Bachchan, their polished and synchronized style drew significant attention. The couple, along with Amitabh and Jaya Bachchan, added a touch of Bollywood glamour to the high-profile event, reaffirming Aishwarya's enduring grace.

title: Abhishek Sharma memes flood social media after another failure in India vs England semi-final
content: India faced England in the T20 World Cup semi-final. Abhishek Sharma's early dismissal again drew attention. His tournament form has been inconsistent. Sanju Samson provided a strong response. Samson scored another half-century. His batting set a positive tone for India's innings. Samson's performance offered cheer for Indian fans on a significant match night.

title: Stranded in India amid tensions, Windies cricket team finally gets update
content: The West Indies cricket team was stranded in India after their T20 World Cup 2026 exit due to flight disruptions caused by restricted Gulf airspace amid Israel-Iran tensions. Frustrated coach Daren Sammy earlier posted, “I just wanna go home” and “At least an update.” He later confirmed, “Got an update. that’s all wi wanted,” as Cricket West Indies works to arrange safe travel.

title: Rohit Sharma caught chatting with India captain SKY before toss
content: Ahead of the T20 World Cup semi-final at Wankhede, former India captain Rohit Sharma was spotted chatting with skipper Suryakumar Yadav before the toss. England captain Harry Brook won the toss and chose to bowl. Both teams entered the knockout clash after inconsistent campaigns but strong Super-8 performances to reach the semi-finals.

title: 'No plans for rationing': How India is shoring up energy supplies amid Middle East crisis
content: Despite the rising tensions in West Asia, India remains confident in its energy supply, undertaking daily assessments and maintaining a strong inventory. By diversifying sourcing to include Australia and Canada, India enhances its energy security. In addition, strategic reserves and ongoing dialogues with global energy organizations and the United States reinforce India's readiness against any supply disruptions.

title: TOISA set to celebrate India’s sporting heroes; Lucknow to host 8th edition
content: Lucknow gears up to host the eighth Times of India Sports Awards on March 21, 2026, honouring India's athletic excellence from 2025.  The prestigious ceremony will celebrate over 45 categories, recognizing triumphs from Neeraj Chopra's global dominance to historic cricket victories by both men's and women's teams, alongside para-athlete achievements and emerging young talents who have inspired the nation.

title: 'It’s been 5 days': Sammy hits panic button amid tensions in Middle East
content: The West Indies team is stranded in India after their T20 World Cup exit due to Middle East airspace restrictions caused by Israel–Iran tensions. Flights have been disrupted, delaying their return home. Frustrated coach Daren Sammy posted, “I just wanna go home” and “At least an update… It’s been 5 days.” Cricket West Indies says it’s working with the ICC to arrange safe travel.

title: Lasers, satellites and cyberattacks: How US is crippling Iran's arsenal
content: Although the fighting is taking place in the Middle East, much of the monitoring work is carried out thousands of kilometres away. Personnel in the United States operate from facilities housing large radar domes known as radomes. These spherical structures resemble giant golf balls and collect satellite data in real time. Analysts use the information to determine missile trajectories and likely targets.

title: Kalyan Singh told an ‘utter lie’: K.K. Venugopal on Babri Masjid case
content: In a candid conversation with The Hindu, K.K. Venugopal discusses the “command from political masters” that triggered the anti-Sikh riots in the 1980s, his sense of betrayal when he realised then-UP CM Kalyan Singh had told him an “utter lie” that the Babri Masjid would not be demolished in the 1990s.

title: Kerala’s public health sector in need of a booster shot
content: Complaints of lapses in the famed public health system of Kerala hog the headlines as the State braces for Assembly polls. C. Maya finds out what is ailing the health sector of the State

title: Rajya Sabha election: Congress fields new face Christopher in Tamil Nadu
content: The 53-year-old is one of the secretaries of the All India Congress Committee, and had been in charge of northeastern States such as Manipur and Nagaland

title: The tumultuous tenure of R.N. Ravi as Tamil Nadu Governor
content: From regularly walking out of the Assembly to raising issues over the appointment of Vice-Chancellors to State-run universities, Ravi and the DMK government led by Chief Minister M.K. Stalin were rarely on the same page

title: KWA to enhance efficiency of water treatment plant in Aluva
content: The upgrade to result in generation of additional 10 MLD of treated water and improvement of drinking water supply in Kochi and adjoining panchayats

title: Internal quota issue hangs fire with discussion incomplete in Cabinet
content: Siddaramaiah told his colleagues that a decision could be taken at a special cabinet that would be called shortly

title: Governor removes Vice-Chancellor of Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit
content: Ciza Thomas, Vice-Chancellor of APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, will hold additional charge of the Vice-Chancellor of the university

title: ASHA workers stage protest in Vijayawada; government responds positively to demands
content: Health Minister assures the workers that steps will be taken to grant leaves in accordance to the norms prescribed under the National Health Mission.

title: Watch: India condoles Khamenei’s death; foreign secretary signs condolence book
content: ndia has formally condoled the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri visited the Iranian Embassy in New Delhi and signed the condolence book on behalf of the Government of India, conveying sympathies to the Iranian people.

title: Watch: The SIR connumdrum in West Bengal and impact on ensuing assembly polls
content: The SIR controversy in West Bengal is emerging as a key political issue ahead of the upcoming Assembly elections. As parties trade charges over the implications of the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls, the debate could influence voter perceptions and shape the poll narrative in the state.

title: Days ahead of polls, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal to get new Governors
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee says Union Home Minister Amit Shah called her and informed about R.N. Ravi’s appointment and that she was “shocked” by the resignation of Ananda Bose

title: Nepal election: Voting concludes with preliminary turnout around 60%
content: The Election Commission had set up 23,112 polling centres at 10,963 polling stations across 77 districts

title: Iran crisis: 60,000 tonnes of basmati rice stuck in ports, exporters seek urgent govt. aid
content: Exporters ask Centre to recognise current logistics disruption as a force majeure type; close to 90% of total rice exports to West Asia, worth about ₹25,000 crore annually, is basmati rice

title: Sri Lankan Supreme Court judge moves Karnataka High Court for removal of links of old online news reports from Google
content: Meanwhile, the High Court asked the advocate for Justice Nawaz to serve notice to Sri Lankan newspapers through emails

title:
Sinking of Iranian ship brings war to region, say 
Sri Lankan and Maldivian leaders
content: They call for closer communication on the issue with India as a ‘net security provider’ in the region

title: Madras Sanskrit College plans reversion to self-financing institution; students oppose move
content: The students say they may lose access to events such as the Kasi Tamil Sangam and national-level competitions and seminars; they add that some teachers, who are paid by the Central Sanskrit University, have also planned to leave by March 31, when the tie-up ends

title: Iran-Israel war grounds IndiGo’s Europe flights
content: IndiGo’s aircraft, leased from the Norwegian carrier Norse, face twin issues of European Union Aviation Safety Agency restrictions and the Pakistan airspace ban

title: NMC tells medical college hospitals to integrate digital health records of all patients
content: All patients coming for OPD, emergency, or hospital admissions must now have linked Ayushman Bharat Health Account IDs; this is aimed at weeding out the fake patients that some colleges submit during the NMC assessment

title: Watch: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose resigns, R.N. Ravi takes charge
content: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose stepped down from his post on March 5, submitting his resignation to President Droupadi Murmu in Delhi. Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi has been appointed to replace him ahead of the State Assembly polls.

title: Fitness Certificates only at designated RTO locations geo-fenced through mVahan app
content: The objective of the new system is to ensure that inspections take place only within authorised areas, and to curb irregularities in the issuance of FCs for commercial vehicles

title: Maoist killed in Dantewada
content: The Maoist was identified as Rajesh Punem, a resident of Burji village and a member of the Bhairamgarh Area Committee

title: Following complaints, Madhya Kailash flyover gets smooth tar coat
content: A retired highways engineer says according to the Indian Roads Congress 2015 Code, a cement concrete wearing coat could be used only in rural areas, where traffic volume would be considerably less

title: ED arrests two chartered accountants in fraud case
content: The investigative agency found that the proceeds of about ₹641 crore were initially credited into mule accounts managed and operated by members of certain Telegram groups

title: Second Iranian warship heads towards Sri Lanka a day after US sub attack
content: A second Iranian warship is en route to Sri Lanka after a US submarine destroyed the IRIS Dena frigate, killing 87 sailors. Sri Lanka is discussing Iran's request for the second vessel to enter its waters for safety, with rescued sailors receiving treatment in Galle.

title: Chaos in Pak camp! Players unhappy with Hesson after T20 WC fiasco
content: Pakistan’s T20 World Cup Super 8 exit has triggered turmoil in the team after heavy losses to India and England. Reports claim several players complained to PCB officials about coach Mike Hesson’s strict and controlling approach during the tournament. The PCB is reviewing his conduct, but he may remain coach because he has a two-year contract and the board wants stability.

title: Title deed distribution in Idukki hits another snag as Kerala High Court stays proceedings
content: The court had recently vacated a previous stay, allowing the State government to issue title deeds under strict condition. However, after the court was informed that the State government was proceeding with the distribution without complying to its specific directives,  a temporary stay was imposed

title: Karnataka High Court suggests State govt. to evolve mechanism for verification of migrant labourers
content: It is equally important to ensure that migrant workers are not stigmatised as a class, since criminal liability is individual in nature and the Constitution protects the dignity and equality of all persons, the bench said.

title: Watch: Rajya Sabha nominations: Nitish Kumar, Sharad Pawar lead the race for power
content: The race for the 2026 Rajya Sabha elections has begun, with 37 seats across 10 states going to polls on March 16. Key leaders in the fray include Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar and veteran politician Sharad Pawar.

title: West Bengal Governor C.V. Ananda Bose resigns ahead of Assembly polls
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee receives information from Union Home Minister Amit Shah; Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi will take up responsibility

title: CB-CID rules out organ theft involving Viluppuram ashram
content: Full body scan done on dozens of destitute and mentally challenged persons who were shifted to other States

title: Tamil Nadu Governor R.N. Ravi transferred to Bengal
content: Mr. Ravi’s transfer was announced by West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in an X post; Kerala Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar will discharge functions of Governor of Tamil Nadu.

title: Global Ayyappa Sangamam: Kerala HC directs auditing firm to file statement on ‘anomalies, deficiencies and lapses’ in TDB accounts
content: Court says records available indicate that substantial amounts have been committed and disbursed without vouchers and receipts and without sufficient clarity as to the financial approvals obtained

title: Belagavi Airport appeals to people not to flash laser lights at aircraft
content: Investigation under way after pilots complain to Mopa Airport authorities in Goa of a laser flash at the Karnataka-Maharashtra border

title: Watch: Epilepsy: Management and care | Webinar
content: This webinar will help demystify epilepsy by explaining its causes, symptoms, and available treatment options. The discussion will focus on how epilepsy is managed over the long term, the importance of timely medical care, and the role of awareness in improving quality of life and reducing stigma.

title: AITUC stages protest demanding immediate revision of minimum wages in Karnataka
content: The protesters call for doubling variable dearness allowance from four paise to eight paise per Consumer Price Index (CPI) point

title: Police quiz Mallikarjun Mutya for second day in POCSO Act case
content: Petition filed by the accused seeking anticipatory bail before the District and Sessions Court in Yadgir will come up for hearing today

title: Eluru canal chokes with garbage; municipal authorities term it a temporary problem
content: Of the three canals and a rivulet that flow through the city, Bandar and Ryves canals do not require much cleaning, while the Budameru rivulet and Eluru canal carry a lot of filth

title: Report conflict in West Asia with utmost caution, says Pinarayi Vijayan
content: He says it is a time for the media to exercise restraint and demonstrate a sense of deep responsibility in covering the unfolding crisis as news relating to the conflict could induce fear and anxiety among the relatives of Keralite expatriates

title: New retaining wall along right margin of Krishna river to protect 20,000 people from floods
content: Nara Lokesh likely to lay foundation stone for the project on March 9; proposal, worth ₹294 crore, was approved in January 2025

title: Madras High Court grants relief to Panneerselvam, H. Raja, ‘Bussy’ Anand in different criminal cases
content: Justice A.D. Jagadish Chandira quashes four criminal cases booked against former Chief Minister, modifies BJP leader’s bail condition and extends interim relief to TVK general secretary

title: Who will succeed Deputy Chairman Harivansh in the Rajya Sabha?
content: As senior Janata Dal-United (JD-U) leader Harivansh, retiring on April 9, has not been renominated by his party, speculation has begun on who will succeed him, and whether the government will be filling the position at all

title: Excessive explosive material caused Vetlapalem blast: SP
content: The accused also intensified the production as the licence expires on March 31; mishandling of explosive material is believed to have triggered the blast on February 28.

title: ‘Friends on Rail’ bats for third, fourth rail lines to address travel woes in Kerala
content: Outfit says highly capital-intensive high-speed rail project is likely to take time due to economic and regional issues

title: Rift in NCP(SP) over Elathur Assembly seat in Kozhikode comes out in the open again
content: Party State president Thomas K. Thomas, MLA, says an appropriate candidate will be chosen after detailed discussions

title: Indian Navy launches search, rescue operations after distress call from Iranian ship near Sri Lanka
content: According to the Indian Navy, the ship was operating about 20 nautical miles west of Galle in the SAR region under Sri Lankan responsibility

title: Lokayukta officials conduct searches in properties belonging to AEE in Hassan, unearth disproportionate assets
content: The Lokayukta registered a case on charges of accumulating assets disproportionate to known sources of income

title: Agriculture Minister Atchannaidu rebuts YSRCP charge on crop loss compensation to farmers
content: The TDP-led coalition government has increased it to ₹25,000 per hectare, he says, accusing the previous dispensation of not paying the State’s share for three years under the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana

title: Forum seeks rehabilitation package for tribal families hit by Wayanad landslides
content: AGMS leader says rehabilitation of 13 tribal families from Punchirimattam and Erattukundu has not progressed despite the inauguration of the first phase of the township project at Mundakkai

title: New fire station opened at Mavoor
content: The new facility, opened by Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan online, is expected to cater for 15 local bodies in Kozhikode and Malappuram districts

title: Saree distribution at Puthuppally Fest by Congress MLA Chandy Oommen triggers political row
content: CPI(M) accuses Chandy Oommen of attempting to influence voters ahead of Assembly polls. MLA says he is willing to make public all accounts related to the event

title: Kerala High Court refuses to entertain fresh plea on The Kerala Story 2-Goes Beyond
content: Bench says it will be improper for the court to entertain the plea, since a writ petition and an appeal regarding the matter are already pending before the court

title: Construction of three seaports will be completed by end of 2026, says Infrastructure Minister Janardhan Reddy
content: The integration of ports with a proper logistics network will establish Andhra Pradesh as a leading maritime gateway of India, he says

title: Experts call for bridging engineering, technology and brain sciences at NIMHANS conference
content: The conference highlights the role of cognitive neuroscience and multidisciplinary research in strengthening mental health care systems

title: Nearly quarter of law and order police stations in Bengaluru function without full-time inspectors
content: Of 116 law and order police stations, nearly 30 do not have full-time inspectors, and inspectors from other stations hold additional charge

title: Lendeborg, Stirtz, more: This season's 25 best transfers
content: only a few teams that have been led by true freshmen in the one-and-done era have won national titles . the transfers have dominated college basketball in the portal era . last season, Walter Clayton Jr. was the Most Outstanding Player in Florida's national title run, two years after transferring from Iona .

title: "Will Give Rs 25,000 To Parents Having 2 Or More Children": Chandrababu Naidu
content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu on Thursday said the state government is considering a Rs 25,000 birth incentive for couples from their second child onwards to boost the falling birth rate.

title: Ukrainian Tourist Kidnapped In Bali, Severed Head Found Weeks Later
content: Authorities in Bali are investigating whether human remains discovered on the island belong to a 28-year-old Ukrainian tourist who was allegedly kidnapped in a violent abduction linked to a ransom demand.

title: PM Modi Speaks To Macron, Discusses "Shared Concern" Over Middle East War
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Thursday spoke to French President Emmanuel Macron and discussed shared concerns over the evolving situation in West Asia, and the need for a return to dialogue and diplomacy.

title: Trump Calls Zelensky 'Obstacle' To Peace, Claims Putin Is 'Ready For Deal'
content: US President Donald Trump on Thursday described Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky as the obstacle to a deal with Russia, whose leader Vladimir Putin he insisted was cooperative.

title: Engineering Student Among 5 Arrested For Robbery In Coimbatore
content: A five-member gang, including a second-year engineering student, has been arrested in Tamil Nadu's Coimbatore for allegedly robbing mobile phones, laptops, and cash from students living alone in private residences at knifepoint.

title: US Asked For Ukraine's Help To Fend Off Iranian Drones In Middle East: Zelensky
content: The United States asked Ukraine for help to fend off Iranian drone attacks in the Middle East, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said Thursday, adding that he had ordered expert support to be given.

title: Blasts Heard In Abu Dhabi, UAE Respond To Missile Threat As War Intensifies
content: Residents in the Emirati capital Abu Dhabi reported hearing a series of loud explosions on Thursday, with UAE air defences responding to a missile threat as Iran pressed on with its retaliation campaign in the Gulf.

title: Not Asking For Ceasefire Or Negotiations With US: Iran Foreign Minister
content: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Thursday that the Islamic Republic was neither asking for a ceasefire nor negotiations with the US, adding that Iran had no plans to close the Strait of Hormuz for now.

title: Tamil Nadu's RN Ravi Appointed Bengal Governor After CV Bose Resigns
content: Tamil Nadu Governor RN Ravi has been appointed as the new Governor of West Bengal after CV Ananda Bose resigned. The change in the poll-bound state is part of an overall reshuffle.

title: Ex-US Envoy Taranjit Singh Sandhu Is New Lt Governor Of Delhi
content: Taranjit Singh Sandhu, India's former ambassador to US, has been made the Lieutenant Governor of Delhi, as the President on Thursday notified the appointment of governors and lieutenant governors of nine states and Union territories.

title: Tehran Unleashes Fury With Missile Tearing Into Key Bahrain Oil Refinery
content: Bahrain says an Iranian missile hit a state-run oil refinery. It said the fire Thursday night was extinguished and the refinery was still working. There were no reports of casualties.

title: "We Have Been Open To Supplying Crude Oil To India": Russian Envoy
content: Russia has always been open to supplying crude oil to India, Russian Ambassador Denis Alipov said on Thursday, amid increasing concerns over spiralling prices of petroleum products in view of the West Asia crisis.

title: Bengal Voter To Delhi Flight: Governor CV Ananda Bose's Whirlwind 7 Days
content: Only six days ago, West Bengal Governor CV Ananda Bose had announced that his voting rights had been transferred to the state, signalling his intent to participate in the upcoming Assembly elections.

title: Trump Calls Khamenei's Son "Unacceptable", Seeks Iran Leader Who Brings Peace
content: US President Donald Trump said he must personally approve Iran's next supreme leader, just as he was involved in installing Delcy Rodriguez as Venezuela's interim president following the US-backed ouster of Nicolas Maduro.

title: Rajasthan Judge's Wife Found Dead In Train Toilet, Rescuers Break Open Door
content: What was meant to be a routine journey home turned into a tragedy for Additional District Judge Rajkumar Chauhan after his wife was found dead inside a train washroom on Wednesday.

title: Sri Lanka Evacuates 208 Crew Members Of Iran Vessel, Day After US Sank Warship
content: Sri Lanka evacuated 208 crew members of an Iranian navy vessel on Thursday, President Anura Kumara Dissanayake said, a day after a US submarine struck and sank another Iranian frigate, killing dozens of sailors.

title: Air Force's Sukhoi Su-30 Goes Missing From Radar Contact In Assam
content: A Sukhoi 30 fighter aircraft has gone missing from radar contact in Assam. Efforts are on to locate it, officials have said

title: Bengal Governor Quits, Mamata Banerjee Says Successor From Tamil Nadu
content: West Bengal Governor CV Ananda Bose, who made headlines over his differences with Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, has resigned, sources have said. Bose is currently in Delhi.

title: Bhopal Perfume Market Hit By Iran-Israel War, Trade Worth Crores Affected
content: Bhopal's perfume trade is not just an old market tradition. It is a living legacy rooted in the city's Nawabi past, sustained for generations through the attar shops and blending units of Jumerati, Ibrahimpura, Jahangirabad and nearby clusters.

title: Suspended Trinamool MLA Humayun Kabir Gets Y-Plus Security Cover Ahead Of Bengal Polls
content: Suspended Trinamool MLA Humayun Kabir, who has now formed his own party to take on the Mamata Banerjee-led Trinamool Congress in the upcoming assembly elections, has been accorded Y-Plus category security cover by the central government.

title: Pre-spring QB rankings for all 68 Power 4 teams
content: college football rosters are as stable as they'll ever be as spring football gets started . 68 power-conference quarterbacks ranked based on stats, trends and recent performances . we have at least a reasonable idea of who will start for most of the teams .

title: Tracking NFL free agency: Updates on re-signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content: free agency officially begins at 4 p.m. ET on monday, with the start of the new league year . teams can actually begin negotiating and agreeing to terms with players at noon ET on Monday, March 9 . four players receiving one: Cowboys WR George Pickens, Falcons TE Kyle Pitts Sr, Jets RB Breece Hall and Colts QB Daniel Jones .

title: Fast break: Who should you pick up before the playoffs begin?
content: the fantasy basketball playoffs are almost here, and context matters more than talent . teams chasing seeding are far more likely to lean heavily on their core players than those playing out the string . goal is not to build the flashiest roster, but to build most reliable one . prioritize players with secure roles and motivated teams .

title: Power Rankings: How Champ Week can help or hurt the top teams
content: the 2025-26 ESPN women's college basketball Power Rankings celebrates their fifth-straight SEC regular season title . the 2026 regular-season champions are also the defending champs of their respective 2025 tournaments .

title: World Cup squads: Predicting starting XIs for England, Spain, France, more
content: ESPN's World Cup Power Rankings reveals the top 15 contenders . the first edition of our rankings is based on form and fitness . we're drilling deeper on the major nations and the three host nations . each of those countries expected to challenge for top honors this summer has a weakness somewhere on the pitch .

title: Reid projects Rounds 1-2 with his new NFL mock draft
content: 2026 draft class updated after the Rams traded their no. 29 pick to the Chiefs . more than 300 prospects for the draft converged on Lucas Oil Stadium for drills, 40-yard dashes, interviews with team personnel and medical exams . there is still more to be done between now and the start of the first round on April 23 in Pittsburgh .

title: Summer transfer needs for all 20 Premier League teams
content: all 20 premier league clubs are working furiously behind the scenes to produce short lists, decide on targets and set their course for next season . don Hutchison and Steve Nicol disagree over Fabian Hürzeler's criticism of arsenal's tactics in their 1-0 win .

title: Big 12 spring preview: Storylines, key positions and players to watch
content: Bear Bachmeier is back for his sophomore season after eclipsing 3,033 passing yards and 15 touchdowns in 2025 . a look at the top storyline, a position of intrigue and player to watch for each Big 12 team heading into the spring . the wildcats roared back last season to fifa .

title: UFC 326 expert picks: Max Holloway is a tough matchup for Charles Oliveira
content: a panel of four offer picks and insight for the main event at UFC 326 . the titleholder is going for his second defense of the ceremonial title . he beat Dustin Poirier by unanimous decision in his last fight in July .
